title: Wardelon's Blazes x Fresh Animations
description: A modified version of Wardelon's Blazes, created to support Fresh Animations. Now you can enjoy not only the new Blazes, but also their nice animations. The screenshots show only a small part of the resource pack! You will see the rest yourself.
body:
A modified version of Wardelon's Blazes, created to support Fresh Animations. Now you can enjoy not only the new Blazes, but also their nice animations. The screenshots show only a small part of the resource pack! You will see the rest yourself.

The [telegram](https://t.me/djakyziWarda) channel has a lot of interesting information about updates, as well as screenshots and early access!
